---
title: "Teaching"
---

### Graduate Teaching Assistant:

- [IR227](https://www.lse.ac.uk/study-at-lse/summer-schools/summer-school/courses/international-relations/ir227){target="_blank"} - Politics of Change: Governing Social Transformation (LSE, Summer School 2026)

- [MY464](https://www.lse.ac.uk/resources/calendar2025-2026/courseGuides/MY/2025_MY464.htm){target="_blank"} - Critical Data Literacy for Media and Communications (2025/2026)

-   [MY451](https://www.lse.ac.uk/resources/calendar2024-2025/courseGuides/MY/2024_MY451A.htm){target="_blank"} - Introduction to Quantitative Analysis (LSE, Master's Level) (2024/2025; 2025/2026)

     **Resources Developed:**
     -   [MY451 GPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-eFSPESO5n-introduction-to-quantitave-analysis){target="_blank"}: Customized ChatGPT to answer questions relying on the coursepack
     -   [NotebookLM Chi-Square](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/c6e75236-2549-4c02-8b3a-e565660def83/audio){target="_blank"}: AI-generated podcast that explains two-way contingency tables and chi-square test of independence
     
     

-   [MY461](https://www.lse.ac.uk/resources/calendar2024-2025/courseGuides/MY/2024_MY461.htm){target="_blank"} - Social Network Analysis (LSE, Master's Level) (2024/2025)
